title: Hit Me with Your Best Shot
why_this_song: Hit Me with Your Best Shot by Pat Benatar (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "best" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "best" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shot" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shot" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That's OK, let's see how you do it
Knock me down, it's all in vain
Come on! Hit me with your best shot

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Pat Benatar one question about "Hit Me with Your Best Shot", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Pat Benatar sobre "Hit Me with Your Best Shot", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Hit Me with Your Best Shot" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Hit Me with Your Best Shot", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.
